title: Settings · Integrations
loadFailed: Failed to load integrations status. Try refreshing the page.
intro: Manage external communication channels and job boards. Owner / hr_admin only.

pipeline.title: Pipeline and scoring
pipeline.description: Configure auto-pipeline thresholds and composite scoring weights. Owner / hr_admin only.

thresholds.title: Auto-pipeline thresholds
thresholds.hint: If left empty, environment defaults are used.

automations.title: Pipeline automation
automations.hint: Toggle each automation on or off for this tenant. When not set, the environment default is used.
automations.clarification: AI candidate clarification loop (also needs CLARIFICATION_LOOP_ENABLED)

validation.thresholdsBothOrEmpty: Fill both thresholds or leave both empty to use environment defaults.
validation.thresholdsRange: Thresholds must be numbers between 0 and 100.
validation.thresholdsOrder: autoReject must be less than or equal to autoSelection.
validation.weightsRequired: All scoring weights must be filled with numeric values.

funnelStages.title: Funnel stage display
funnelStages.description: Customise Kanban column labels, order, and visibility. Owner / hr_admin only.
funnelStages.loadFailed: Failed to load funnel stage settings.
funnelStages.saveFailed: Failed to save funnel stage settings.

validation.duplicateStages: Each stage must appear at most once.
